title: nasturtium obtusum
intro: Nasturtium obtusum, also known as Indian cress or common nasturtium, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. The health benefits of Nasturtium obtusum include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and skin problems. Herbal preparations of Nasturtium obtusum can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
